notes: Round 8 — VO overlap fix: s01 (pin-welcome) audio_duration_sec=5.51s but s02 (pin-create) was delayed only 3500ms, causing a 2.04s overlap at 0:03-0:05. Fixed by pushing s02 adelay from 3500ms to 6000ms. Confirmed via silencedetect: silence_start=5.45s, silence_end=6.06s — clean gap between clips. No cascade change needed; next step (pin-pick-type) is at 11000ms. Same trimmed visual, same VO clips, audio-only re-mux. Round 7: tooltip occlusion fix — split image-library step into three targeted steps. 14/14 steps, 77.2s.

steps.display_text: A Pin on Image slide lets participants tap anywhere on a custom image to mark their answer.
steps.tts_text: A Pin on Image slide lets participants tap anywhere on a custom image to mark their answer.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Pin on Image from the Unscored section of the slide type picker.
steps.tts_text: Select Pin on Image from the Unscored section of the slide type picker.

steps.display_text: Type your spatial question — tell participants exactly what to pin.
steps.tts_text: Type your spatial question — tell participants exactly what to pin.

steps.display_text: Click the image area to open the image library and choose a photo for your slide.
steps.tts_text: Click the image area to open the image library and choose a photo for your slide.

steps.display_text: Switch to the Stock Photos tab to search the library.
steps.tts_text: Switch to the Stock Photos tab to search the library.

steps.display_text: Type a keyword to find the perfect photo — we're searching for a world map.
steps.tts_text: Type a keyword to find the perfect photo — we're searching for a world map.

steps.display_text: Tap any result to select it.
steps.tts_text: Tap any result to select it.

steps.display_text: Adjust the crop if you like, then hit Save to add the world map to your slide.
steps.tts_text: Adjust the crop if you like, then hit Save to add the world map to your slide.

steps.display_text: Click Preview to rehearse before going live.
steps.tts_text: Click Preview to rehearse before going live.

steps.display_text: The participant screen shows your image. Your audience taps it on their phone to drop a pin.
steps.tts_text: The participant screen shows your image. Your audience taps it on their phone to drop a pin.

steps.display_text: Pins appear live on the presenter screen as responses come in.
steps.tts_text: Pins appear live on the presenter screen as responses come in.

steps.display_text: Click the back arrow to return to the editor.
steps.tts_text: Click the back arrow to return to the editor.

steps.display_text: That's all it takes. Hit Present when you're ready to go live.
steps.tts_text: That's all it takes. Hit Present when you're ready to go live.

mix_command: FFMPEG=./node_modules/ffmpeg-static/ffmpeg && $FFMPEG -y -i out/pin-on-image-r7-trimmed.webm -i out-r7-vo/s01.mp3 -i out-r7-vo/s02.mp3 -i out-r7-vo/s03.mp3 -i out-r7-vo/s04.mp3 -i out-r7-vo/s05.mp3 -i out-r7-vo/s06.mp3 -i out-r7-vo/s07.mp3 -i out-r7-vo/s08.mp3 -i out-r7-vo/s09.mp3 -i out-r7-vo/s10.mp3 -i out-r7-vo/s11.mp3 -i out-r7-vo/s12.mp3 -i out-r7-vo/s13.mp3 -i out-r7-vo/s14.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=0|0[a1];[2:a]adelay=6000|6000[a2];[3:a]adelay=11000|11000[a3];[4:a]adelay=16000|16000[a4];[5:a]adelay=22000|22000[a5];[6:a]adelay=26500|26500[a6];[7:a]adelay=28000|28000[a7];[8:a]adelay=38500|38500[a8];[9:a]adelay=42500|42500[a9];[10:a]adelay=52000|52000[a10];[11:a]adelay=56500|56500[a11];[12:a]adelay=65500|65500[a12];[13:a]adelay=70000|70000[a13];[14:a]adelay=73500|73500[a14];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7][a8][a9][a10][a11][a12][a13][a14]amix=inputs=14:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k out/pin-on-image-r8-narrated.webm
